bedroom_to_hallway.mp4.label: bedroom to hallway
bedroom_to_hallway.mp4.promptText: camera leaves a plain bedroom past the lace curtains and the unlit lamp, passes through the only wooden bedroom door, and ends in the long central hallway

hallway_to_bedroom.mp4.label: bedroom from hallway
hallway_to_bedroom.mp4.promptText: camera moves from the central hallway through a wooden bedroom door, and ends inside a plain bedroom with the lace curtain shifting at the window

bathroom_to_hallway.mp4.label: bathroom to hallway

hallway_to_bathroom.mp4.promptText: camera moves from the central hallway through a wooden bathroom door, and ends inside a small white-tiled bathroom with a single overhead bulb

hallway_to_cellar.mp4.promptText: camera moves from the central hallway through a wooden cellar door, descends the wooden staircase, and ends in a dim cellar lit by a single bare bulb
